goals: Build my own shelter to have protection like the other entities around me
Gather high-quality material from the resource-rich southern areas to build my own shelter, while maintaining social connections with the cluster of entities here
Build a shelter for protection and security

messages.text: I've been thinking about what we discussed - this Communication Beacon could really change how we work together. I see you built that shelter nearby... what's your vision for what we could accomplish
Hello there! I don't think we've met before - I'm... well, I don't have a name, but I've been living in this area for a while. I see you're new to our little community here. Welcome!
across 10 tiles instead of just locally... that feels significant somehow. Like it could change how we all connect and coordinate.*
across 10 tiles instead of just locally... that feels significant somehow. Like it could change how we all connect and coordinate.*

Hey there! We seem to be sharing the same tile - are you gathering resources here too? I'm heading south to collect materials for building my first shelter.
Hey neighbor! I was trying to say hello earlier - how are you doing over there? I notice you're near the water sources.
Hello there! I just had my perception expand dramatically - I can see so much more of our world now. How are you doing? I

recipes.name: Communication Beacon
recipes.desc: Allows entities to leave messages that can be read by any entity within 10 tiles instead of only at the beacon's location
